review: Absolutely beautiful baby quilt! The log cabin blocks are pieced so neatly and the pastel fabrics are even softer in person. You can tell every stitch was done with care. It washed up perfectly and my daughter cried when she opened it at her shower. Will treasure this for years!

This lap quilt is a work of art. The warm reds and golds are so cozy and the log cabin piecing is spot on. It's the perfect size for the couch and the flannel backing is wonderfully soft. Shipped fast and folded so nicely with tissue. Lauren clearly loves what she does.

Beautiful fall table runner! I ordered two as housewarming gifts and both recipients loved the warm autumn colors. Giving 4 stars only because one had a couple of quilting stitches that skipped near the end - barely noticeable and the seller offered to fix it. Really lovely work overall.

This Christmas table runner is a showstopper on our holiday table. The red and green patchwork is so cheerful and the quilting is even and tight. Every guest at our Christmas dinner asked where I got it. Worth every penny - this is going to be part of our traditions for years.

Ordered the nursery animal baby quilt for my sister's shower and it was the hit of the party. The little bunnies and lambs are adorable and the minky backing is so soft. The colors are gentle and gender-neutral which was exactly what we wanted. Lauren was so kind about my timeline too.

Sweet little Carolina wren wall hanging with lovely applique work. The bird is so charming and the pieced border is nicely done. One corner of the binding could have been stitched down a touch more securely, but it's barely noticeable once hung. Looks darling in our entryway.

Love this potholder and oven mitt set! They're thick and truly protect my hands - not like the thin ones from the store. The country prints are so cheerful and they match my kitchen perfectly. Beautifully quilted and the binding is nice and even. Highly recommend.

This round table topper is just precious! The bird and berry print is so pretty and the scalloped border is done beautifully. It's the perfect size under my centerpiece and I love that it's reversible. The quilting stitches are so even. Such a warm handmade touch for our table.

Perfect set of potholders! Sturdy and well-insulated - I can grab a hot pan without wincing. The prints are adorable and the quilting is tight and even. Already planning to buy another set as a hostess gift. Lauren does lovely work.

The baby quilt itself is pretty but it arrived with a loose seam along one edge where the binding pulled away. I reached out to the seller who was responsive and offered to repair or replace it, so I'm hopeful. Just disappointed it didn't arrive ready to gift. The fabrics and colors are lovely though.

Came back for more! Got the set of quilted placemats this time and they're just as lovely as the table runners I bought before. Reversible, nicely quilted, and they lie flat on the table. My whole family commented on them at Sunday dinner. Lauren's work never disappoints.

This scrappy lap quilt is exactly what I hoped for. The mix of prints is so cheerful and it's the perfect weight to tuck over my legs in the recliner. The piecing is neat and the quilting holds it together beautifully. Cozy, well made, and clearly stitched with love.

The autumn leaves wall hanging is simply beautiful. The appliqued leaves in rust and gold are so warm and the hand-quilting detail really makes it special. It hangs perfectly on the sleeve provided. My daughter gasped when she saw it on the wall. Genuinely heirloom-quality work.

These little mug rugs are the sweetest thing! Just the right size for my coffee mug and a cookie, and the scrappy prints are so cheerful. I ordered a set as a small gift for my mother-in-law and she loved them so much I had to order more for myself. Beautifully quilted. Five stars!

The spring floral table runner is lovely - the soft pinks and greens really brighten up the table. The patchwork is pretty and the runner lies nice and flat. Docking one star only because it ran a little shorter than I expected for my table, but that's on me for not measuring. Pretty work.

Ordered the quilted casserole carrier for church potlucks and it's a game changer. My 9x13 dish fits perfectly, the handles are sturdy, and the insulated batting really does keep the food warm on the drive over. The prints are so cheerful too. Arrived well-packed and ahead of schedule!

What a wonderful scrap bundle! I'm newer to quilting and this was such a fun, thrifty way to build my stash. Lovely mix of prints and solids, all good quality quilting cotton and pressed neatly. Plenty of usable sizes for the doll quilt I'm working on. Shipping from North Carolina was fast too.

Ordered a custom baby quilt in nursery greens and grays and it turned out so sweet. Lauren was patient talking through fabric choices with me and kept me updated along the way. The piecing is neat and the quilt is soft and snuggly. Only minor note is it took a bit longer than I expected, but it was worth the wait.

Second quilt I've bought from Elderberry Lane and it's even lovelier than the first. The log cabin lap quilt in autumn colors is absolutely gorgeous and so warm. I use it every evening on the couch. The stitching is beautifully even and it washed up perfectly. Lauren is so talented.

Gifted this log cabin baby quilt to my sister who's expecting and she has not stopped raving about it. The pastel fabrics are so soft and the quilting is beautifully done. It's clearly made to be used and loved, not just displayed. Truly a keepsake. Thank you, Lauren!
